intro_opening_zh.value: 近年来，{领域}受到了广泛关注。{具体问题}是该领域的关键问题之一。

intro_gap_zh.value: 然而，现有研究主要集中在{方向}，对{空白}的研究仍然不足。

intro_objective_zh.value: 本研究旨在{目标}，以{方法}为核心手段，探究{问题}。

result_finding_zh.value: 结果表明，{变量1}与{变量2}呈显著{方向}相关(r={值}, p<{值})。

result_comparison_zh.value: {组1}的{指标}显著{高于/低于}{组2}({值} vs {值}, p={值})。

discussion_mechanism_zh.value: 这一现象的可能机制是{机制描述}。{引用}也报道了类似的发现。

discussion_contrast_zh.value: 与{引用}的研究不同，本研究发现{差异}。这一差异可能源于{原因}。

discussion_significance_zh.value: 本研究的发现对{领域}具有{理论/实践}意义，为{应用}提供了{依据/参考}。

conclusion_summary_zh.value: 本研究通过{方法}，系统分析了{对象}，发现{核心发现}。

intro_opening_en.value: {Topic} has attracted considerable attention in recent years.

intro_gap_en.value: However, existing studies have primarily focused on {direction}, leaving {gap} largely unexplored.

result_finding_en.value: The results revealed a significant {positive/negative} correlation between {var1} and {var2} (r={value}, p<{value}).

discussion_mechanism_en.value: A possible mechanism underlying this phenomenon is {mechanism}.

value.template: {变量A}与{变量B}呈显著{正/负}相关(r={r}, p={p})。{机制}。{文献}也报道了类似关系。
然而，{现有不足}。特别是{具体空白}尚未{开展/解决}。
{发现}。机制如下：{步骤1}，进而{步骤2}，最终{结果}。
碳平衡分析表明，{相态}碳占总碳的{百分比}%，是{主导/次要}碳形式。{意义}。

value.pattern: Partial nitrif[VAR]ation has the advantages of saving energy and reducing the need for carbon sources in mun[VAR]ipal wastewater treatment.
However, for mun[VAR]ipal wastewater with low ammonia, start-up and maintenance of partial nitrif[VAR]ation is a worldwide challenge.

Here we developed a pilot-scale [VAR]uble sludge system consisting of two sequencing ba[VAR]h reactors for partial nitrif[VAR]ation ([NUM] m[NUM]) and denitrif[VAR]ation/anaerob[VAR]ammonium oxidation (denitrif[VAR]ation/anammox, [NUM] m[NUM]) to treat mun[VAR]ipal wastewater.
Partial nitrif[VAR]ation was maintained at no ammonium remaining with a nitrite accumulation rate of [VALUE_UNIT].

This study found that partial nitrif[VAR]ation system effluent chem[VAR]al oxygen demand increased from [NUM] mg L−[NUM] to [NUM] mg L−[NUM] accompanied by transformation from complete nitrif[VAR]ation to partial nitrif[VAR]ation.
In the denitrif[VAR]ation/anammox system, the reduction of nitrite to nitrogen required about [VALUE_UNIT] less carbon consumption than nitrate.
High nitrogen removal was achieved with effluent total inorgan[VAR]nitrogen of [NUM] mg L−[NUM] without carbon addition.
This work provided a pilot-scale demonstration of low-carbon high-nitrogen removal.
Yongzhen Peng and colleagues achieved high nitrogen removal in mun[VAR]ipal wastewater treatment by sequentially combining partial nitrif[VAR]ation and denitrif[VAR]ation reactors.
This pilot-scale study provides a low-energy and low-carbon technology toward a sustainable wastewater treatment solution.
To address the challenges associated with biolog[VAR]al treatment of high-salinity wastewater, a novel salt-tolerant strain, Zobellella en[VAR][VAR]yt[VAR]a W[NUM], was isolated.
This strain exhibited heterotro[VAR][VAR]nitrif[VAR]ation-aerob[VAR]denitrif[VAR]ation (HN-AD) capabilities.
Strain W[NUM] could grow and remove ammonium in high-salinity environments with salinity levels ranging from [NUM] to [VALUE_UNIT] (w/v).

At [VALUE_UNIT] salinity, strain W[NUM] demonstrated high removal eff[VAR]iencies for nitrite, ammonium, and nitrate ([VALUE_UNIT], [VALUE_UNIT], and [VALUE_UNIT], respectively), when these compounds were provided as the single source of nitrogen.
In cases of mixed nitrogen sources, total nitrogen removal eff[VAR]iency of strain reached [VALUE_UNIT].
The nitrogen balance analysis confirmed the utilization of nitrogen sources by strain W[NUM] through both assimilation and dissimilation.

Through the amplif[VAR]ation of functional genes involved in nitrogen metabolism (i.e. , hao, napA, nirS, and nosZ), the nitrogen metabolism pathway of strain W[NUM] was pred[VAR]ted to be: [CHEM[VAR]AL]⁺ → NH₂OH → NO₂⁻ → [CHEM[VAR]AL]⁻ → NO₂⁻ → NO → [CHEM[VAR]AL] → N₂.
The study reveals that the novel W[NUM] strain can eff[VAR]iently remove total nitrogen from high-salinity wastewater and has signif[VAR]ant potential for biolog[VAR]al treatment of such wastewater.
Constantly increased sewage sludge (SS) and fruit and vegetable wastes (FVW) are becoming the major organ[VAR]solid wastes in human society.
Thus, anaerob[VAR]digestion is employed as a low carbon energy strategy to reduce their environmental pollution risk.
Anaerob[VAR]co-digestion system was developed based on the carbon to nitrogen ratio strategy.

Results showed that the daily biogas production was higher in co-digester, and the volumetr[VAR]biogas production rate (VBPR) signif[VAR]antly enhanced for [NUM]∼[NUM] folds, and the highest VBPR was [NUM] L/L • day with optimal OLR of [NUM] Kg L-[NUM] d-[NUM]
Analyt[VAR]results ind[VAR]ated that co-digestion could improve the biodegradable of feeds[VAR]ks, wh[VAR]h transforming to more VFAs and biogas.
Compared with mono SS digester, mixed substrates relieved ammonia nitrogen inhibition and enhanced the hydrolyt[VAR]acidif[VAR]ation and methanogenesis.
Meanwhile, the excessive humif[VAR]ation of organ[VAR]s was suppressed.
This study supported the concepts of improving carbon recovery from SS and FVW.
Climate change and cadmium (Cd) contamination pose severe threats to r[VAR]e production and food security.
Biochar (BC) has emerged as a promising soil amendment for mitigating these challenges.
To investigate the BC effects on paddy soil upon GHG emissions, Cd bioavailability, and its accumulation, a meta-analysis of published data from [NUM] to [NUM] was performed.
Data Manager [NUM] and GetData plot Digitizer software were used to obtain and process the data for selected parameters.
Our results showed a signif[VAR]ant increase of [VALUE_UNIT] in soil [VAR]with sewage sludge BC appl[VAR]ation, while [VALUE_UNIT] increase in soil organ[VAR]carbon (SOC) using bamboo chips BC.

There was a signif[VAR]ant reduction in soil bulk density ([VALUE_UNIT]), but no signif[VAR]ant effects were observed for soil porosity, except for wheat straw BC wh[VAR]h reduced the soil porosity by [VALUE_UNIT].
Sewage sludge and bamboo chips BC signif[VAR]antly reduced carbon dioxide (CO[NUM]) by [NUM]-[VALUE_UNIT] while mun[VAR]ipal biowaste reduced methane (CH[NUM]) emissions by [VALUE_UNIT].
In the case of heavy metals, sunflower seedshells-derived materials and r[VAR]e husk BC signif[VAR]antly reduced the bioavailable Cd in paddy soils by [VALUE_UNIT] and [VALUE_UNIT], respectively.
Cd uptake by r[VAR]e roots was lowered considerably by the addition of ki[VAR]hen waste ([VALUE_UNIT]), peanut hulls ([VALUE_UNIT]), and corn cob ([VALUE_UNIT]) based BC.

Similarly, cotton st[VAR]ks, ki[VAR]hen waste, peanut hulls, and r[VAR]e husk BC restr[VAR]ted Cd translocation from r[VAR]e roots to shoots by [VALUE_UNIT], [VALUE_UNIT], [VALUE_UNIT], and [VALUE_UNIT], respectively, while sawdust and r[VAR]e husk-based BC were effective for reducing Cd accumulation in r[VAR]e grains by [VALUE_UNIT] and [VALUE_UNIT].
Regarding r[VAR]e yield, cotton st[VAR]ks-based BC signif[VAR]antly increased the yield by [VALUE_UNIT] in Cd-contaminated paddy soil.

The meta-analysis demonstrated that BC is an effective and multi-pronged strategy for sustainable and resilient r[VAR]e cultivation by lowering greenhouse gas emissions and Cd accumulation while improving yields under the increasing threat of climate change.
Direct catalyt[VAR]decomposition of methane (CDM) has been studied as a possible emission-free hydrogen production route for over [NUM] years.
However, the high cost of catalyst regeneration limits its pract[VAR]al appl[VAR]ations.

Here, we demonstrate that the solid by-product from CDM using Fe ore catalysts comprising carbon nano onions encapsulated with magnet[VAR]Fe cores (Fe@C) can serve as eff[VAR]ient and recyclable Fenton catalysts for pollutant degradation.
Fe@C/H[NUM]O[NUM] has better performance than FeSO[NUM]/H[NUM]O[NUM] at similar Fe concentrations and can be used to decompose various pollutants.
Mechanist[VAR]studies reveal that gra[VAR]it[VAR]carbon layers and encapsulated Fe[NUM] contribute to their high catalyt[VAR]activity.
Further, Fe@C can be easily recovered from an aqueous solution and reused due to the encapsulated magnet[VAR]Fe part[VAR]les.
Over three reused cycles, Fe@C/H[NUM]O[NUM] only yields [NUM]/[NUM] of Fe sludges compared to FeSO[NUM]/H[NUM]O[NUM], signif[VAR]antly reducing Fe sludge treatment costs.
Overall, Fe@C demonstrates excellent appl[VAR]ation potentials in water and wastewater treatment, making H[NUM] production via CDM econom[VAR]ally more viable.
The art[VAR]le considers the issues of non-repeatability of exhaust emission and fuel consumption test results for road veh[VAR]les tested on a chassis dynamometer.
Empir[VAR]al results of passenger car tests on a chassis dynamometer in the WL[VAR] test were used.
